---
title: Join Us 
---

## Join Our Team 

If you are an enthusiastic undergraduate student at the University of Michigan and would like to learn more about my research group, please email Professor Matzger: matzger@umich.edu. If you are interested in doing a summer internship, feel free to email professor Matzger and apply to the NSF Chemistry REU program. Ph.D. positions are open for the 2026-2027 cycle. Please see the links below for more information about applying to be a graduate student at the University of Michigan.
